title: Deepslate Destroyer
description: Adds Deepslate Destroyer pickaxe, which is a heavy version of Netherite Pickaxe.. made to destroy deepslate.
body:
### Deepslate Destroyer
..for when you're sick of all that deepslate.. deep down there.

This pickaxe uses vanilla netherite pickaxe texture, so any resource pack will work perfectly fine.

#

The recipe itself will cost you quite a lot, but for the price of instamining that pesky, annoying deepslate.. it's worth it.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac276fc8724ca19150cbcb9fffa7b5337a2fc4fa.png)

But wait! That's not all. You also have to enchant it with **Efficency V** and have **Haste II** effect active on yourself. It needs a little magic to kickstart, you know?

You will see that the pickaxe is activated when it starts glowing with red tint.

#

_This is a small commision mod for a reddit user. Maybe someone else will find it useful._
